scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace packages/types && npm run build --workspace packages/constants && npm run build --workspace packages/utils && npm run build --workspace packages/ui && npm run build --workspace apps/api && npm run build --workspace apps/web
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start -w apps/api" "npm run start -w apps/web"
